name: Pyrefeather Token
description:
Activate f (concentrate)

Trigger You succeed at, fail, or critically fail a recovery check while by 1.

This pyrefowl feather, accentuated with beadwork, stores a spark of the bird's self-healing power. When you Activate the token, you reduce the triggering recovery check's DC by 1, potentially improving your check's degree of success. You also gain 5 temporary Hit Points that last for 1 minute. You can Activate this talisman even while .
